ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "dimension" TEXT /* Dimension or type of the product (e.g., ISO 4014 / DIN 931) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product (e.g., A2, A4, SS 304, 316) */,
  "diameter_min" TEXT /* Minimum diameter of the product (e.g., M-12) */,
  "diameter_max" TEXT /* Maximum diameter of the product (e.g., M-100) */,
  "length_min" TEXT /* Minimum length of the product (e.g., 20 mm) */,
  "length_max" TEXT /* Maximum length of the product (e.g., 500 mm) */,
  "finish" TEXT /* Finish of the product (e.g., Bright) */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade of the product (e.g., A2, A4, SS304, 304L, 316, 316L) */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the product (e.g., steel, stainless steel, aluminum) */,
  "coating" TEXT /* Coating of the product (e.g., zinc, galvanized, nickel) */,
  "thread_type" TEXT /* Type of thread (e.g., coarse, fine) */,
  "head_type" TEXT /* Type of head (e.g., hex, socket, flat) */,
  "drive_type" TEXT /* Type of drive (e.g., hex key, Phillips, slotted) */,
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the standard the product adheres to */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier of the product */,
  "stock_level" INTEGER /* Current stock level of the product */,
  "reorder_point" INTEGER /* Reorder point for the product */,
  "last_stock_update" TEXT /* Date of the last stock update */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the product was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the product was last updated */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* Country where the product is manufactured */,
  "unit_of_measure" TEXT /* Unit of measure for the product (e.g., pieces, kg) */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Lead time for delivery (in days) */,
  "minimum_order_quantity" INTEGER /* Minimum quantity that can be ordered */,
  "product_status" TEXT /* Status of the product (e.g., active, discontinued) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_standard_id FOREIGN KEY ("standard_id") REFERENCES standards ("standard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "standards" (
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each standard */,
  "standard_name" TEXT /* Name of the standard (e.g., ISO 4014 / DIN 931) */,
  "standard_description" TEXT /* Description of the standard */,
  "standard_type" TEXT /* Type of standard (e.g., international, national) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country associated with the standard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact person at the supplier */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the supplier */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "company_website" TEXT /* Website of the supplier */,
  "shipping_terms" TEXT /* Standard shipping terms (e.g., FOB, CIF) */,
  "payment_terms" TEXT /* Standard payment terms (e.g., 30 days, 60 days) */,
  "quality_rating" INTEGER /* Quality rating of the supplier (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Average lead time for delivery (in days) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the supplier was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the supplier information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., sales, warehouse, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to (e.g., sales, warehouse, IT) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory log entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the log entry pertains to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., add, remove, reorder) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product involved in the action */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date the action was performed */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location where the inventory change occurred (e.g., warehouse A, warehouse B) */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the inventory change (e.g., sale, return, damage) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the log entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the log entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_logs_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who placed the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, completed) */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Address to which the order will be shipped */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Method of shipping (e.g., air, sea, truck) */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the order */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the order was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the order was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_variants" (
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product variant */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the variant belongs to */,
  "variant_name" TEXT /* Name of the variant (e.g., Bright, Black) */,
  "variant_description" TEXT /* Description of the variant */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the variant */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image for the variant */,
  "availability" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the variant is available */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the variant was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the variant information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_variants_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)
